metadata.title: Integrated management for high-performance operations.
metadata.description: Rakudash centralizes fragmented data, streamlines recruitment pipelines, and automates administrative workflows.

hero.title: Total Control for your Haken Gaisha
hero.subtitle:
Systematize the entire lifecycle of your operation. 
From recruitment and contracts to the daily management of time-offs, cash advances, and housing, Rakudash centralizes your company's administration and permanently eliminates the dependency on scattered spreadsheets and error-prone manual processes.

scrolly.step1_desc: Relying on scattered spreadsheets and manual processes fragments operational data. Asynchronous communication between the office and the factory floor generates reworkng inconsistencies, and compliance vulnerabilities.
scrolly.step2_desc: Rakudash acts as the core of your back office. It consolidates and automatically processes the entire administrative pipeline: from contract management to attendance tracking, housing control, and cash advances.
scrolly.step3_desc: A closed ecosystem that eliminates double data entry. Factory management inputs primary data via EnTori, the back office unifies operations through Rakudash, and employees access their dashboard via WanSpot. Consistent data in real-time.

metrics.title: The Ultimate Ecosystem for Staffing Agencies
metrics.subtitle: From recruitment to the paycheck. An infrastructure where information flows without manual intervention, connecting candidates, management, and employees in real-time.

entori.subtitle: Recruitment & Retention
entori.description: Paper bureaucracy drives away good candidates. With digital onboarding via mobile, you eliminate the entry barrier and ensure 100% of data lands structured in the database, ready for allocation.

rakudash.subtitle: Efficiency & Compliance
rakudash.description: Decentralization is costly. Replace dozens of fragile spreadsheets with a single engine. What took your HR team weeks to cross-reference, Rakudash consolidates in real-time.

wanspot.subtitle: Satisfaction & Transparency
wanspot.description: An employee in the dark is a dissatisfied employee. By granting autonomy for time-off and cash advance requests directly in the palm of their hand, you eliminate miscommunication and build trust.

metrics.cta_title: Ready to see the gears up close?

features.title: Detailed View
features.subtitle: Explore the main features of our ecosystem and understand how each tool simplifies your daily operation.
features.docs_link_prefix: To see the complete manual, access the

entori.title: Application Form
entori.desc: Candidates register directly via an online form, fully integrated into the system. Upon filling out the fields, a complete registration profile is created for tracking, even before the candidate officially accepts the job.

entori.title: Privacy and Data Protection
entori.desc: Before submitting their resume, the candidate must agree to the data processing policy. The platform acts merely as a transmission channel: the submitted information is routed and stored exclusively in the contracting agency's isolated database. The system does not retain data in a general engine, ensuring that the dispatch company acts as the sole owner and legal entity responsible for candidate protection.

rakudash.title: Employee Lifecycle
rakudash.desc: The dashboard centralizes the employee's administrative journey into a unified workflow. The manager can approve admissions pulled from EnTori, register and monitor dependents and social insurances (Shakai Hoken and Koyo Hoken), process allocation transfers (Idou), and generate the necessary documents for termination (Taisha).

rakudash.title: Resume Export
rakudash.desc: Based on the information and licenses registered in the candidate's profile, the manager can generate a formatted resume in PDF or Excel with a single click. The export feature uses resume templates configured by the agency itself to auto-fill fields for presentation to clients.

rakudash.title: Housing Module (Shitaku)
rakudash.desc: The dashboard features a dedicated tab for managing properties rented by the company. The manager links employees to properties, monitors active housing contracts, and registers monthly expenses (such as water, electricity, and gas), automatically prorating them as deductions on the payroll.

rakudash.title: Client Company Management
rakudash.desc: Client companies are managed individually. The manager registers rules for clock-in/out times, overtime calculation, and departments. The client's organizational structure mirrors shifts and sectors to ensure correct allocation and attendance calculation.

rakudash.title: Timesheet and Attendance Closing
rakudash.desc: The manager imports the timesheets filled out during the period, and the system cross-references this data with the client company's specific rules. The calculation of regular hours, overtime, days off, deductions, and taxes is performed automatically to generate the monthly closing and feed the paystubs in WanSpot.

rakudash.title: Paid Leave (Yukyu) Batches
rakudash.desc: The paid leave (Yukyu) granting process complies with Japanese labor laws, automatically crediting batches of days off after the probationary period. The dashboard unifies this data to show the manager the balance of available days, while also allowing the monitoring and approval of requests coming from WanSpot.

rakudash.title: Secure Digital Archive
rakudash.desc: The system includes a centralized cloud repository for storing the operation's documentation. The manager can securely import and export sensitive data and records, eliminating reliance on paper files or vulnerable local folders.

wanspot.title: Documents and Contracts Hub
wanspot.desc: Employees have access to a digital gallery containing their personal documents and employment contracts generated by the company. Whenever a new allocation contract or housing rental contract is signed by the manager in Rakudash, the document becomes immediately available for viewing and download in the app.

wanspot.title: Paystub Viewer
wanspot.desc: After the monthly closing of hours and payments, the detailed paystub is released in the system. The employee accesses the app to check the exact breakdown of their earnings, deductions, and taxes for the period, generated automatically according to the rules defined for the client company.

wanspot.title: Cash Advance Request
wanspot.desc: If the company provides this option, the employee fills out a cash advance request form on the WanSpot platform, and the request is automatically sent to the Rakudash management dashboard. The employee can view the request status until the manager authorizes it.

wanspot.title: Yukyu (Paid Leave) Request
wanspot.desc: Employees can request paid time off (Yukyu) directly through the app with full autonomy. Rakudash intercepts the request, automatically checks against the company's eligibility rules, and sends a request to the manager for a one-click approval, completely eliminating paper forms and misplaced documents.

contact_page.title: Contact Us
contact_page.subtitle: Fill out the form below to talk to our experts.
contact_page.privacy_notice: By submitting this form, you agree to our <1>Terms of Use</1> and <2>Privacy Policy</2>.
contact_page.success_message: Thank you for contacting us. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: OpenScope only collects data voluntarily provided in the form: company name, name, email, phone and message content.

purpose.title: Purpose of use
purpose.content: The data is used exclusively for commercial contact or responding to the request sent by the user.

storage.title: Storage
storage.content: The data is not stored in a database. The information is sent only by email.

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.content: The data is not shared with third parties, partners or external services.

security.title: Security
security.content: Reasonable technical measures are adopted to protect data during transmission.

rights.title: User rights
rights.content: The user can request the deletion of the sent data or clarification at any time.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: OpenScope contact channel for privacy-related matters.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.description: These Terms of Use govern the access and use of the services offered by OpenScope.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance
acceptance.content: By using our services or submitting contact forms, you automatically agree to these terms. If you do not agree with any clause, please do not use the platform.

usage.title: 2. Conditions of Use
usage.content: The platform must be used only for its intended purposes. Any attempt to breach security, send spam, or insert fraudulent data is strictly prohibited.

modifications.title: 3. Modifications
modifications.content: OpenScope reserves the right to update these terms at any time. Modifications take effect immediately upon publication on the website.

openscope_home.title:
Your Operation. 
Elevated to Maximum Efficiency.
openscope_home.subtitle: We develop custom systems and intelligent platforms that eliminate manual labor, integrate your data, and prepare your infrastructure to scale without bottlenecks.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.description: Many companies still rely on decentralized spreadsheets, paper, and manual processes. This generates rework, operational errors, mismatched data, and communication failures. As the operation grows, these problems multiply.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.description: OpenScope specializes in systematizing and automating B2B processes. We centralize information, standardize flows, and integrate critical data into a single ecosystem, reducing human failures and increasing operational efficiency.

target.title: Ideal Profile
target.subtitle: Our ecosystem is perfectly scaled for companies that:
list: Manage large volumes of employees or clients
Operate with distributed or remote teams
Suffer from manual or decentralized processes
Require more control, traceability, and organization

how_we_work.title: How we work
how_we_work.description: We analyze the company's current processes, identify bottlenecks and design the ideal solution. After implementation, data begins to flow in an integrated way between the office and employees.

about_page.title: About OpenScope
about_page.subtitle: Elevating the operational standard of companies through intelligent technology.

who_we_are.title: Who We Are
who_we_are.description: We are a technology company specialized in solving complex operational inefficiencies. Our focus is on developing custom systems and SaaS platforms that replace flawed manual processes with robust, secure, and automated data architectures.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To systematize, automate, and integrate our clients' data, ensuring scalability and absolute control over their operations.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be the definitive B2B technology partner for companies seeking structural modernization in Japan.

founder.name: Vinicius Nakamura Goes
founder.bio: "I am a systems engineer and I seek to use my skills to improve business work processes. With extensive experience in haken systematization, I decided to create OpenScope to serve companies by addressing common pain points: the lack of integration and communication between the office and employees."

ui_lead.name: Victor Gama de Farias
ui_lead.bio: "The visual is as important as the engine. My passion for details drives me to create interfaces that truly matter. I am dedicated to delivering a product that is robust and comprehensive under the hood, yet incredibly simple and intuitive for the end user."
